# Lupine Science — unlocking the materials that build the future

Lupine Science is accelerating materials discovery. AI is learning to design
matter — the batteries, catalysts, alloys and chips a civilization runs on —
but on simulations that are wrong in structured ways. We make those predictions
trustworthy so discovery accelerates instead of stalling on guesswork. The
mathematics (the error geometry of interatomic potentials) is how; the materials
are why.

Public entry point for the Lupine Library research corpus, LUPI evidence viewer,
and open repository.

Canonical surfaces:

- Library: https://library.lupine.science
- LUPI: https://lupi.live
- Repository: https://github.com/alexwelcing/lupine
- Hyper-Ribbon theorem demo: https://library.lupine.science/reports/hyper-ribbon-theorem.html

Public paper status: working draft in preparation; no peer review, no
acceptance, and no journal or venue assignment. Prefer Library and repository
pages for current claim labels, Lean status, and evidence details.
